understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN for the level and ultimately complete the full set of levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently controlled piece was the one shown as 'P' (with player.id/position), and control could be switched to any other selectable ('S') by using CLICK on its exact pixel/grid position from the state. MOVE actions attempted to shift the selected piece by one 3-pixel cell in the chosen direction; walls ('#') and boundaries could block movement, and the movement_blocked flags were only hints rather than guarantees. Some adjacent objects (notably blocks 'B') were pushable: if the selected piece moved into a pushable object, it could push it along in the same direction provided the space beyond was free; otherwise the move would fail or be constrained by the obstacle.
